# Omar Al-Bakri

> Director, Partnerships & Customer Solutions at RTGS.global. FinTech sales leader with 15+ years in Financial Services, specialising in cross-border payments, AI strategy, and business development across ASIAPAC.

## About

Omar Al-Bakri is a senior FinTech professional based in the UK. He currently leads partnerships and client solutions at RTGS.global, a cloud-native settlement platform enabling instant cross-border payments. His career spans 15+ years across banking, payments, and financial technology.

## Current Role

- **Title**: Director, Partnerships & Customer Solutions
- **Company**: RTGS.global
- **Focus**: Cross-border payments, PSP/MTO/EMI partnerships, ASIAPAC market development
- **Started**: October 2024

## Career History

- Director, Partnerships & Customer Solutions — RTGS.global (2024–Present)
- Founder — FiduciaNex|Ai (2024)
- Senior Account Relationship Manager — Banking Circle (2023)
- Head of Bank Sales EMEA — Convera (2021–2023)
- Principal, Financial Services — Marlin Hawk (2018–2020)
- Prior roles at Bank of America Merrill Lynch and BNP Paribas

## Expertise

- Cross-border payments and settlement infrastructure
- FinTech partnership development and sales
- AI strategy and business transformation
- Treasury and liquidity management
- Regulatory and compliance frameworks

## Education

- BSc Physiology & Pharmacology — Nottingham Trent University

## Contact

- Website: https://omarbakri.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/omaralbakri
- Email: oab@omarbakri.com

## About RTGS.global

RTGS.global is a cloud-native settlement platform that enables instant cross-border payments. It bypasses SWIFT and correspondent banking, settling in seconds across 30+ currencies with no pre-funding or collateral required. Banks, PSPs, and MTOs integrate via a single API.
